name: Gemini CLI
prerequisites: Gemini CLI >=0.45.2 installed and on PATH as `gemini` (Node binary, e.g. ~/.nvm/.../bin/gemini)
Authenticated via Google OAuth (settings.json security.auth.selectedType=oauth-personal); set up out-of-band, no API key
DEADLINE: Gemini CLI stops serving Google One / unpaid tiers on 2026-06-18 — after that, recordings on those tiers fail auth; migrate to Antigravity CLI or a paid tier
First run in a fresh cwd shows a trust-folder prompt; the driver auto-accepts it (or pre-trust the dir)
Use `gemini -y` (yolo, auto-approves tools) for interactive driving; `gemini -p "<prompt>"` for headless smoke
